narrative:
Pleasant Township has 1,320 registered voters, with 46.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.6 percentage points.
